message:
fuzz: add command parser fuzz target with seed corpus

Add fuzz_command_parse target covering:
- RESP frame parsing to argv conversion
- Command classification (is_write_command, is_known_command)
- Key extraction (command_keys, command_key_indexes)
- Arity checking

Includes 89 seed corpus files covering all major Redis command types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,9 @@ path = "../crates/fr-persist"
 [dependencies.fr-store]
 path = "../crates/fr-store"
 
+[dependencies.fr-command]
+path = "../crates/fr-command"
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_resp_parser"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resp_parser.rs"
@@ -56,3 +59,10 @@ path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dump_restore.rs"
 test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_command_parse"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_command_parse.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
